question: Locate players with vision scores of 90 and above, state the country of these players.
candidate_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name, c.name AS country
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
JOIN Match m ON (pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_1 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_2 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_3 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_4 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_5 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_6 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_7 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_8 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_9 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_10 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_11 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_1 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_2 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_3 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_4 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_5 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_6 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_7 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_8 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_9 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_10 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_11)
JOIN Country c ON m.country_id = c.id
WHERE pa.vision > 89;
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t4.name FROM Player_Attributes AS t1 INNER JOIN Player AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id INNER JOIN Match AS t3 ON t2.player_api_id = t3.home_player_8 INNER JOIN Country AS t4 ON t3.country_id = t4.id WHERE t1.vision > 89
clean_sql: SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name, c.name AS country FROM Player_Attributes pa JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id JOIN Match m ON (pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_1 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_2 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_3 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_4 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_5 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_6 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_7 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_8 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_9 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_10 OR pa.player_api_id = m.home_player_11 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_1 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_2 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_3 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_4 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_5 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_6 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_7 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_8 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_9 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_10 OR pa.player_api_id = m.away_player_11) JOIN Country c ON m.country_id = c.id WHERE pa.vision > 89;

question: Which country's players have the heaviest average weights?

question: Are there more in-patient or outpatient who were male? What is the deviation in percentage?
candidate_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN inpatient_count > outpatient_count THEN 'in-patient'
        ELSE 'outpatient'
    END AS larger_group,
    ROUND(
        ABS(
            (inpatient_count - outpatient_count) * 100.0 / 
            CASE 
                WHEN outpatient_count = 0 THEN inpatient_count 
                ELSE outpatient_count 
            END
        ), 
        2
    ) AS deviation_percentage
FROM (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN p."Admission" = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inpatient_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p."Admission" = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_count
    FROM "Patient" p
    WHERE p."SEX" = 'M'
) counts;
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Patient WHERE SEX = 'M'
clean_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN inpatient_count > outpatient_count THEN 'in-patient' ELSE 'outpatient' END AS larger_group, ROUND( ABS( (inpatient_count - outpatient_count) * 100.0 / CASE WHEN outpatient_count = 0 THEN inpatient_count ELSE outpatient_count END ), 2 ) AS deviation_percentage FROM ( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN p."Admission" = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inpatient_count, SUM(CASE WHEN p."Admission" = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_count FROM "Patient" p WHERE p."SEX" = 'M' ) counts;

question: What is the age gap between the youngest and oldest patient with a normal triglyceride recorded?
candidate_sql: SELECT MAX(CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p."Birthday") AS INTEGER)) - MIN(CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p."Birthday") AS INTEGER)) AS age_gap FROM "Patient" p JOIN "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID" WHERE l."TG" >= 200;
gold_sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', MAX(T1.Birthday)) - STRFTIME('%Y', MIN(T1.Birthday)) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.TG >= 200
clean_sql: SELECT MAX(CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p."Birthday") AS INTEGER)) - MIN(CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p."Birthday") AS INTEGER)) AS age_gap FROM "Patient" p JOIN "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID" WHERE l."TG" >= 200;

question: For the year that concluded on December 31, 1998, how many male patients on average were tested in the lab each month?
candidate_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT l."ID") / 12.0 AS average_male_patients_per_month
FROM "Laboratory" l
JOIN "Patient" p ON l."ID" = p."ID"
WHERE l."Date" BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31'
  AND p."SEX" = 'M';
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.ID) AS REAL) / 12 FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) = '1998' AND T1.SEX = 'M'
clean_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT l."ID") / 12.0 AS average_male_patients_per_month FROM "Laboratory" l JOIN "Patient" p ON l."ID" = p."ID" WHERE l."Date" BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31' AND p."SEX" = 'M';

question: The oldest SJS patient's medical laboratory work was completed on what date, and what age was the patient when they initially arrived at the hospital?
candidate_sql: SELECT l."Date", (strftime('%Y', p."First Date") - strftime('%Y', p."Birthday")) AS age_at_arrival FROM "Patient" p JOIN "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID" WHERE p."Diagnosis" = 'SJS' ORDER BY p."Birthday" ASC LIMIT 1;
gold_sql: SELECT T1.Date, STRFTIME('%Y', T2.`First Date`) - STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Birthday),T2.Birthday FROM Laboratory AS T1 INNER JOIN Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.Diagnosis = 'SJS' AND T2.Birthday IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.Birthday ASC LIMIT 1
clean_sql: SELECT l."Date", (strftime('%Y', p."First Date") - strftime('%Y', p."Birthday")) AS age_at_arrival FROM "Patient" p JOIN "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID" WHERE p."Diagnosis" = 'SJS' ORDER BY p."Birthday" ASC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the ratio of male to female patients among all those with abnormal uric acid counts?
candidate_sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN p."SEX" = 'M' AND l."UA" <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / 
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN p."SEX" = 'F' AND l."UA" <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM "Patient" p
JOIN "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID"
WHERE (p."SEX" = 'M' AND l."UA" <= 8.0) OR (p."SEX" = 'F' AND l."UA" <= 6.5);
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.UA <= 8.0 AND T1.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.UA <= 6.5 AND T1.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
clean_sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN p."SEX" = 'M' AND l."UA" <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN p."SEX" = 'F' AND l."UA" <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS male_to_female_ratio FROM "Patient" p JOIN "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID" WHERE (p."SEX" = 'M' AND l."UA" <= 8.0) OR (p."SEX" = 'F' AND l."UA" <= 6.5);

question: How many patients hadn't undergone a medical examination until at least a year following their initial hospital visit?

question: What is the average age of patients as of year 1999 examined in the laboratory for the October of the year 1991?

JOIN "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID"
WHERE l."Date" BETWEEN '1991-10-01' AND '1991-10-31';

question: How old was the patient who had the highest hemoglobin count at the time of the examination, and what is the doctor's diagnosis?
candidate_sql:
SELECT 
    (strftime('%Y', e."Examination Date") - strftime('%Y', p."Birthday")) - 
    (strftime('%m-%d', e."Examination Date") < strftime('%m-%d', p."Birthday")) AS Age,
    e."Diagnosis"
FROM "Examination" e
JOIN "Patient" p ON e."ID" = p."ID"
JOIN "Laboratory" l ON e."ID" = l."ID" AND e."Examination Date" = l."Date"
WHERE l."HGB" = (SELECT MAX("HGB") FROM "Laboratory")
LIMIT 1;
gold_sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday), T1.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID ORDER BY T2.HGB DESC LIMIT 1
clean_sql: SELECT (strftime('%Y', e."Examination Date") - strftime('%Y', p."Birthday")) - (strftime('%m-%d', e."Examination Date") < strftime('%m-%d', p."Birthday")) AS Age, e."Diagnosis" FROM "Examination" e JOIN "Patient" p ON e."ID" = p."ID" JOIN "Laboratory" l ON e."ID" = l."ID" AND e."Examination Date" = l."Date" WHERE l."HGB" = (SELECT MAX("HGB") FROM "Laboratory") LIMIT 1;

question: For the patient who was born on 1959/2/18, what is the decrease rate for his/her total cholesterol from November to December in 1981?
candidate_sql:
SELECT 
    (nov.T_CHO - dec.T_CHO) * 100.0 / nov.T_CHO AS decrease_rate
FROM 
    (SELECT AVG("T-CHO") AS T_CHO FROM Laboratory l JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID WHERE p.Birthday = '1959-02-18' AND l.Date LIKE '1981-11-%') nov,
    (SELECT AVG("T-CHO") AS T_CHO FROM Laboratory l JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID WHERE p.Birthday = '1959-02-18' AND l.Date LIKE '1981-12-%') dec;
gold_sql: SELECT CAST((SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN T2.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN T2.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN T2.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
clean_sql: SELECT (nov.T_CHO - dec.T_CHO) * 100.0 / nov.T_CHO AS decrease_rate FROM (SELECT AVG("T-CHO") AS T_CHO FROM Laboratory l JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID WHERE p.Birthday = '1959-02-18' AND l.Date LIKE '1981-11-%') nov, (SELECT AVG("T-CHO") AS T_CHO FROM Laboratory l JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID WHERE p.Birthday = '1959-02-18' AND l.Date LIKE '1981-12-%') dec;

question: What proportion of patients who had signs of thrombocytopenia had SLE diagnosed?
candidate_sql:
SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN p."Diagnosis" LIKE '%SLE%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN l."PLT" < 150 OR e."Symptoms" LIKE '%thrombocytopenia%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS proportion
FROM "Patient" p
LEFT JOIN "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID"
LEFT JOIN "Examination" e ON p."ID" = e."ID"
WHERE l."PLT" < 150 OR e."Symptoms" LIKE '%thrombocytopenia%';
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Diagnosis = 'SLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(ID) FROM Examination WHERE Symptoms = 'thrombocytopenia'
clean_sql: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN p."Diagnosis" LIKE '%SLE%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN l."PLT" < 150 OR e."Symptoms" LIKE '%thrombocytopenia%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS proportion FROM "Patient" p LEFT JOIN "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID" LEFT JOIN "Examination" e ON p."ID" = e."ID" WHERE l."PLT" < 150 OR e."Symptoms" LIKE '%thrombocytopenia%';

question: What is the average attendance of meetings in 2020?
candidate_sql:
SELECT AVG(attendance_count) AS average_attendance
FROM (
    SELECT e.event_id, COUNT(a.link_to_member) AS attendance_count
    FROM event e
    LEFT JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
    WHERE e.type = 'Meeting' AND strftime('%Y', e.event_date) = '2020'
    GROUP BY e.event_id
) AS event_attendance;
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T2.link_to_event) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.link_to_event) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE SUBSTR(T1.event_date, 1, 4) = '2020' AND T1.type = 'Meeting'
clean_sql: SELECT AVG(attendance_count) AS average_attendance FROM ( SELECT e.event_id, COUNT(a.link_to_member) AS attendance_count FROM event e LEFT JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event WHERE e.type = 'Meeting' AND strftime('%Y', e.event_date) = '2020' GROUP BY e.event_id ) AS event_attendance;

question: Calculate the difference of the total amount spent in all events by the Student_Club in year 2019 and 2020.

question: How many times was the budget in Advertisement for "Yearly Kickoff" meeting more than "October Meeting"?
candidate_sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT SUM(b.amount) 
     FROM budget b 
     JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id 
     WHERE b.category = 'Advertisement' AND e.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff') /
    (SELECT SUM(b.amount) 
     FROM budget b 
     JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id 
     WHERE b.category = 'Advertisement' AND e.event_name = 'October Meeting') AS times_more;
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.event_name = 'October Meeting' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) FROM budget AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id WHERE T1.category = 'Advertisement' AND T2.type = 'Meeting'
clean_sql: SELECT (SELECT SUM(b.amount) FROM budget b JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id WHERE b.category = 'Advertisement' AND e.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff') / (SELECT SUM(b.amount) FROM budget b JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id WHERE b.category = 'Advertisement' AND e.event_name = 'October Meeting') AS times_more;

question: Based on the total cost for all event, what is the percentage of cost for Yearly Kickoff event?

FROM expense ex
JOIN budget b ON ex.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN T3.cost ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(T3.cost) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget
clean_sql: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN ex.cost ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(ex.cost)) AS percentage FROM expense ex JOIN budget b ON ex.link_to_budget = b.budget_id JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;

question: Among the members who incurred expenses in more than one event, who paid the most amount?
candidate_sql:
SELECT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, SUM(e.cost) AS total_paid
FROM member m
JOIN expense ex ON m.member_id = ex.link_to_member
JOIN budget b ON ex.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE m.member_id IN (
    SELECT m2.member_id
    FROM member m2
    JOIN expense ex2 ON m2.member_id = ex2.link_to_member
    JOIN budget b2 ON ex2.link_to_budget = b2.budget_id
    GROUP BY m2.member_id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT b2.link_to_event) > 1
)
GROUP BY m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name
ORDER BY total_paid DESC
LIMIT 1;
gold_sql: SELECT T2.member_id FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.link_to_member = T2.member_id INNER JOIN budget AS T3 ON T1.link_to_budget = T3.budget_id INNER JOIN event AS T4 ON T3.link_to_event = T4.event_id GROUP BY T2.member_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T4.event_id) > 1 ORDER BY SUM(T1.cost) DESC LIMIT 1
model_error: Operational error: no such column: e.cost
clean_sql: SELECT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, SUM(e.cost) AS total_paid FROM member m JOIN expense ex ON m.member_id = ex.link_to_member JOIN budget b ON ex.link_to_budget = b.budget_id JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id WHERE m.member_id IN ( SELECT m2.member_id FROM member m2 JOIN expense ex2 ON m2.member_id = ex2.link_to_member JOIN budget b2 ON ex2.link_to_budget = b2.budget_id GROUP BY m2.member_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT b2.link_to_event) > 1 ) GROUP BY m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name ORDER BY total_paid DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Calculate the difference in the percentage of members in New Jersey and Vermont.
candidate_sql:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN zc.state = 'New Jersey' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) - 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN zc.state = 'Vermont' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_difference
FROM member m
JOIN zip_code zc ON m.zip = zc.zip_code
WHERE m.position = 'Member';
gold_sql: SELECT CAST((SUM(CASE WHEN T2.state = 'New Jersey' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.state = 'Vermont' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.member_id) AS diff FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T2.zip_code = T1.zip
clean_sql: SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN zc.state = 'New Jersey' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) - (COUNT(CASE WHEN zc.state = 'Vermont' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_difference FROM member m JOIN zip_code zc ON m.zip = zc.zip_code WHERE m.position = 'Member';

gold_sql: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, T1.position FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T2.zip_code = T1.zip WHERE T2.city = 'Lincolnton' AND T2.state = 'North Carolina' AND T2.zip_code = 28092
clean_sql: SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, m.position FROM member m JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code WHERE z.city = 'Lincolnton' AND z.state = 'North Carolina' AND z.zip_code = 28092;

question: How many gas stations in CZE has Premium gas?
candidate_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT gs."GasStationID") 
FROM "gasstations" gs 
JOIN "transactions_1k" t ON gs."GasStationID" = t."GasStationID" 
JOIN "products" p ON t."ProductID" = p."ProductID" 
WHERE gs."Country" = 'CZE' AND p."Description" LIKE '%Premium%';
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(GasStationID) FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'CZE' AND Segment = 'Premium'
clean_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT gs."GasStationID") FROM "gasstations" gs JOIN "transactions_1k" t ON gs."GasStationID" = t."GasStationID" JOIN "products" p ON t."ProductID" = p."ProductID" WHERE gs."Country" = 'CZE' AND p."Description" LIKE '%Premium%';

question: What is the ratio of customers who pay in EUR against customers who pay in CZK?
candidate_sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio
FROM customers;
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(Currency = 'EUR', 1, 0)) AS FLOAT) / SUM(IIF(Currency = 'CZK', 1, 0)) AS ratio FROM customers
clean_sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio FROM customers;

question: In 2012, who had the least consumption in LAM?
candidate_sql:
SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE ym.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212' AND c.Segment = 'LAM'
GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
ORDER BY TotalConsumption ASC
LIMIT 1;
gold_sql: SELECT T1.CustomerID FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Segment = 'LAM' AND SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' GROUP BY T1.CustomerID ORDER BY SUM(T2.Consumption) ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many customers in KAM had a consumption of less than 30,000 for the year 2012?

question: What was the difference in gas consumption between CZK-paying customers and EUR-paying customers in 2012?
candidate_sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT SUM(y.Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth y 
     JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID 
     WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212') 
    - 
    (SELECT SUM(y.Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth y 
     JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID 
     WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR' AND y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212') 
    AS consumption_difference;
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(IIF(T1.Currency = 'CZK', T2.Consumption, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T1.Currency = 'EUR', T2.Consumption, 0)) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) = '2012'
clean_sql: SELECT (SELECT SUM(y.Consumption) FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212') - (SELECT SUM(y.Consumption) FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR' AND y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212') AS consumption_difference;

question: What is the difference in the annual average consumption of the customers with the least amount of consumption paid in CZK for 2013 between SME and LAM, LAM and KAM, and KAM and SME?
candidate_sql:
WITH CustomerTotalConsumption AS (
    SELECT 
        y.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
      AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
SegmentMinConsumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MIN(TotalConsumption) AS MinTotalConsumption
    FROM CustomerTotalConsumption
    GROUP BY Segment
),
MinConsumptionCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        ctc.CustomerID,
        ctc.Segment,
        ctc.TotalConsumption
    FROM CustomerTotalConsumption ctc
    JOIN SegmentMinConsumption smc 
        ON ctc.Segment = smc.Segment 
        AND ctc.TotalConsumption = smc.MinTotalConsumption
),
SegmentAnnualAverage AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        AVG(TotalConsumption) AS AnnualAvgConsumption
    FROM MinConsumptionCustomers
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT AnnualAvgConsumption FROM SegmentAnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'SME') - 
    (SELECT AnnualAvgConsumption FROM SegmentAnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_minus_LAM,
    (SELECT AnnualAvgConsumption FROM SegmentAnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - 
    (SELECT AnnualAvgConsumption FROM SegmentAnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_minus_KAM,
    (SELECT AnnualAvgConsumption FROM SegmentAnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'KAM') - 
    (SELECT AnnualAvgConsumption FROM SegmentAnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_minus_SME;
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'SME', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) - CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'LAM', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) , CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'LAM', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) - CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'KAM', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) , CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'KAM', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) - CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'SME', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Currency = 'CZK' AND T2.Consumption = ( SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth ) AND T2.Date BETWEEN 201301 AND 201312
clean_sql: WITH CustomerTotalConsumption AS ( SELECT y.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND c.Currency = 'CZK' GROUP BY y.CustomerID, c.Segment ), SegmentMinConsumption AS ( SELECT Segment, MIN(TotalConsumption) AS MinTotalConsumption FROM CustomerTotalConsumption GROUP BY Segment ), MinConsumptionCustomers AS ( SELECT ctc.CustomerID, ctc.Segment, ctc.TotalConsumption FROM CustomerTotalConsumption ctc JOIN SegmentMinConsumption smc ON ctc.Segment = smc.Segment AND ctc.TotalConsumption = smc.MinTotalConsumption ), SegmentAnnualAverage AS ( SELECT Segment, AVG(TotalConsumption) AS AnnualAvgConsumption FROM MinConsumptionCustomers GROUP BY Segment ) SELECT (SELECT AnnualAvgConsumption FROM SegmentAnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'SME') - (SELECT AnnualAvgConsumption FROM SegmentAnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_minus_LAM, (SELECT AnnualAvgConsumption FROM SegmentAnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - (SELECT AnnualAvgConsumption FROM SegmentAnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_minus_KAM, (SELECT AnnualAvgConsumption FROM SegmentAnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'KAM') - (SELECT AnnualAvgConsumption FROM SegmentAnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_minus_SME;

question: Which of the three segments—SME, LAM and KAM—has the biggest and lowest percentage increases in consumption paid in EUR between 2012 and 2013?
candidate_sql:
WITH consumption_by_segment_year AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR' 
        AND SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4)
),
pivot_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2012' THEN TotalConsumption END) AS Consumption_2012,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN TotalConsumption END) AS Consumption_2013
    FROM consumption_by_segment_year
    GROUP BY Segment
),
percentage_change AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        Consumption_2012,
        Consumption_2013,
        (Consumption_2013 - Consumption_2012) AS Increase_Decrease,
        ((Consumption_2013 - Consumption_2012) / Consumption_2012) * 100.0 AS Percentage_Increase
    FROM pivot_consumption
    WHERE Consumption_2012 > 0
)
SELECT 
    Segment,
    Percentage_Increase
FROM percentage_change
WHERE Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
ORDER BY Percentage_Increase DESC
LIMIT 1

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    Segment,
    Percentage_Increase
FROM percentage_change
WHERE Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
ORDER BY Percentage_Increase ASC
LIMIT 1;
gold_sql: SELECT CAST((SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'SME' AND T2.Date LIKE '2013%', T2.Consumption, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'SME' AND T2.Date LIKE '2012%', T2.Consumption, 0))) AS FLOAT) * 100 / SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'SME' AND T2.Date LIKE '2012%', T2.Consumption, 0)), CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'LAM' AND T2.Date LIKE '2013%', T2.Consumption, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'LAM' AND T2.Date LIKE '2012%', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS FLOAT) * 100 / SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'LAM' AND T2.Date LIKE '2012%', T2.Consumption, 0)) , CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'KAM' AND T2.Date LIKE '2013%', T2.Consumption, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'KAM' AND T2.Date LIKE '2012%', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS FLOAT) * 100 / SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'KAM' AND T2.Date LIKE '2012%', T2.Consumption, 0)) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
model_error: Operational error: ORDER BY clause should come after UNION ALL not before
clean_sql: WITH consumption_by_segment_year AS ( SELECT c.Segment, SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) AS Year, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption FROM yearmonth ym JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR' AND SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013') GROUP BY c.Segment, SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) ), pivot_consumption AS ( SELECT Segment, MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2012' THEN TotalConsumption END) AS Consumption_2012, MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN TotalConsumption END) AS Consumption_2013 FROM consumption_by_segment_year GROUP BY Segment ), percentage_change AS ( SELECT Segment, Consumption_2012, Consumption_2013, (Consumption_2013 - Consumption_2012) AS Increase_Decrease, ((Consumption_2013 - Consumption_2012) / Consumption_2012) * 100.0 AS Percentage_Increase FROM pivot_consumption WHERE Consumption_2012 > 0 ) SELECT Segment, Percentage_Increase FROM percentage_change WHERE Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM') ORDER BY Percentage_Increase DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT Segment, Percentage_Increase FROM percentage_change WHERE Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM') ORDER BY Percentage_Increase ASC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the percentage of the customers who used EUR in 2012/8/25?

question: For the customer who paid 634.8 in 2012/8/25, what was the consumption decrease rate from Year 2012 to 2013?
candidate_sql:
WITH customer_paid AS (
    SELECT t.CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k t
    WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25' AND t.Price = 634.8
),
consumption_2012 AS (
    SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_2012
    FROM yearmonth y
    WHERE y.CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM customer_paid) AND y.Date LIKE '2012%'
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID
),
consumption_2013 AS (
    SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_2013
    FROM yearmonth y
    WHERE y.CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM customer_paid) AND y.Date LIKE '2013%'
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID
)
SELECT 
    (c12.total_2012 - c13.total_2013) / c12.total_2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM consumption_2012 c12
JOIN consumption_2013 c13 ON c12.CustomerID = c13.CustomerID;
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2012', Consumption, 0)) - SUM(IIF(SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2013', Consumption, 0)) AS FLOAT) / SUM(IIF(SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2012', Consumption, 0)) FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = ( SELECT T1.CustomerID FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID WHERE T1.Date = '2012-08-25' AND T1.Price = 634.8 )
clean_sql: WITH customer_paid AS ( SELECT t.CustomerID FROM transactions_1k t WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25' AND t.Price = 634.8 ), consumption_2012 AS ( SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_2012 FROM yearmonth y WHERE y.CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM customer_paid) AND y.Date LIKE '2012%' GROUP BY y.CustomerID ), consumption_2013 AS ( SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_2013 FROM yearmonth y WHERE y.CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM customer_paid) AND y.Date LIKE '2013%' GROUP BY y.CustomerID ) SELECT (c12.total_2012 - c13.total_2013) / c12.total_2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate FROM consumption_2012 c12 JOIN consumption_2013 c13 ON c12.CustomerID = c13.CustomerID;

question: What is the percentage of "premium" against the overall segment in Country = "SVK"?

question: Who is the top spending customer and how much is the average price per single item purchased by this customer? What currency was being used?
candidate_sql:
WITH customer_spending AS (
    SELECT 
        t.CustomerID,
        c.Currency,
        SUM(t.Price) AS total_spent,
        SUM(t.Price) / SUM(t.Amount) AS avg_price_per_item
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    GROUP BY t.CustomerID, c.Currency
),
top_customer AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        Currency,
        total_spent,
        avg_price_per_item
    FROM customer_spending
    ORDER BY total_spent DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    CustomerID,
    avg_price_per_item,
    Currency
FROM top_customer;
gold_sql: SELECT T2.CustomerID, SUM(T2.Price / T2.Amount), T1.Currency FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T2.CustomerID = ( SELECT CustomerID FROM yearmonth ORDER BY Consumption DESC LIMIT 1 ) GROUP BY T2.CustomerID, T1.Currency
clean_sql: WITH customer_spending AS ( SELECT t.CustomerID, c.Currency, SUM(t.Price) AS total_spent, SUM(t.Price) / SUM(t.Amount) AS avg_price_per_item FROM transactions_1k t JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID GROUP BY t.CustomerID, c.Currency ), top_customer AS ( SELECT CustomerID, Currency, total_spent, avg_price_per_item FROM customer_spending ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT CustomerID, avg_price_per_item, Currency FROM top_customer;

question: For all the people who paid more than 29.00 per unit of product id No.5. Give their consumption status in the August of 2012.
candidate_sql:
SELECT y.CustomerID, y.Consumption
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE t.ProductID = 5 
  AND (t.Price / t.Amount) > 29.00
  AND y.Date = '201208'
GROUP BY y.CustomerID, y.Consumption;
gold_sql: SELECT T2.Consumption FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Price / T1.Amount > 29.00 AND T1.ProductID = 5 AND T2.Date = '201208'
clean_sql: SELECT y.CustomerID, y.Consumption FROM transactions_1k t JOIN yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID WHERE t.ProductID = 5 AND (t.Price / t.Amount) > 29.00 AND y.Date = '201208' GROUP BY y.CustomerID, y.Consumption;
